Configures exception handlers for app and worker heaps in process management.

# Purpose
This C header file defines a function prototype and two forward declarations for structures. The `Heap` and `PebbleProcessMd` structures are declared but not defined in this file, indicating that their definitions are elsewhere. The function [`process_heap_set_exception_handlers`](<#process_heap_set_exception_handlers>) is declared to configure exception handlers for application and worker heaps, specifically handling corruption and double-free errors. This function takes a pointer to a `Heap` and a constant pointer to a `PebbleProcessMd` as parameters, suggesting it is part of a memory management or error handling system for applications. The file uses the `#pragma once` directive to prevent multiple inclusions during compilation.
